CustomField.description: True when the job was triggered headlessly (Flow/REST/portal) rather than from the LWC. Tells SplitJobService.runMergeAndPrepareForSplit to enqueue the self-hosted pdf-lib service for the final split step instead of waiting for the LWC.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set automatically by the headless entry point. Don't toggle manually.
CustomField.label: Is Headless
